jsonLd.title: Principal Radiologist at Piramal Pharma
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Radiologist looking for your next big career move? Piramal Pharma in Nagpur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Piramal Pharma:
Piramal Pharma is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in ICU Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Piramal Pharma!
